## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Turing and GrowthX to explore potential content collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation services, combining human expertise with AI workflows for high-quality, domain-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Turing has multiple business lines (AI labs, applied AI, talent sourcing) with distinct content needs and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Highest priority for Turing is content for AI labs and applied AI, particularly for Fortune 500 enterprises building AI systems](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Further discussion needed to explore how GrowthX's services could align with Turing's specific content requirements and business priorities](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Background and Services

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, former growth leader at HashiCorp, ServiceTitan, and Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Offers AI-powered content creation services with human experts in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Uses proprietary workflow engine and knowledge graph for efficient, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Clients include Webflow, Ramp, and Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Specializes in editorial content, programmatic pages, and custom content solutions](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### Turing's Business Lines and Content Needs

  - [Multiple business lines: AI labs, applied AI for enterprises, talent sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [AI labs require high-quality research content (highest priority)](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Applied AI needs verticalized content for multiple industries and personas (significant opportunity)](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Talent sourcing benefits from SEO-centric content with dedicated pages for specific job titles](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Content Priorities and Challenges

  - [ELT prioritizes content for AI labs and applied AI over talent sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [AI labs content needs strong distribution strategy beyond just creation](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Applied AI content has more potential for search-driven discovery](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Talent sourcing content (e.g., knowledge base) hasn't been updated recently](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [High-quality research content for AI labs (if GrowthX can demonstrate expertise)](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Verticalized content for applied AI targeting Fortune 500 enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Possibly updating and expanding talent sourcing content, though lower priority](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler from GrowthX to send meeting recording and schedule a deeper dive discussion](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Turing team to internally discuss potential areas for collaboration with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Explore GrowthX's capabilities in creating high-quality content for AI labs and applied AI sectors](https://fathom.video/share/3nvmE8t3oJbC7Pyrsc3gizH_KzsxyonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
